data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Container epic: all 8 child stories are closed + completion-certified, and their commits (Gerrit changes 399-406, each LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1) reference the child tickets. The epic's aggregate file_impact is delivered entirely through those children; there is no dedicated epic commit by design.". Session: 073933565.
